decision: Should the team pilot the AI procurement-copilot in the supplier-onboarding workflow?
decision_body: Risk and Compliance Council (RCC), chaired by the Head of Procurement Operations.
default_outcome: No copilot. The supplier-onboarding process continues unchanged; existing manual reviews remain the bottleneck.

claims.claim: Past supplier-onboarding cycles reported 18% rework on document completeness.
claims.weakest_link: Rework rate depends on which document class is reviewed; the 18% mixes clean and unclear cases.
claims.gap_that_changes_mind: If rework rate is below 8%, manual review cost is likely lower than the cost of any copilot experiment.

claims.claim: An LLM with retrieval over the supplier handbook can answer 70% of completeness questions correctly.
claims.weakest_link: The 50-case set was constructed by the proposer and may over-represent easy cases.
claims.gap_that_changes_mind: If a new, unseen 50-case set shows <50% accuracy, the copilot does not yet justify a pilot.

claims.claim: Risk and Compliance want a human-in-the-loop check before any decision is sent to a supplier.
claims.weakest_link: Different RCC members interpret 'human-in-the-loop' differently — checkpoint vs full review.
claims.gap_that_changes_mind: If the operational meaning is not agreed, the pilot cannot specify acceptance criteria.

claims.claim: Mid-market procurement teams using retrieval copilots reduce review time by 30–50% in similar pilots.
claims.source: public vendor case studies, sample of 3 anonymized writeups (synthetic)
claims.weakest_link: Industry sources are vendor-promoted and selection-biased.
claims.gap_that_changes_mind: If a peer-reviewed benchmark shows <15% review-time reduction, the projected value is overstated.

claims.claim: Audit logs require capturing: input document, retrieval context, model output, human edit, final supplier email.
claims.source: public: NIST AI RMF Manage function + OWASP LLM Top 10 logging guidance
claims.weakest_link: Storage cost and reviewer ergonomics are not yet scoped.
claims.gap_that_changes_mind: If logging costs exceed projected copilot savings, the business case collapses.

readers: Risk and Compliance lead at a mid-market procurement team
Procurement operations manager preparing a pilot
AI governance analyst at a regulated enterprise
artifact.survives_author: A GitHub toolkit can be cloned, adapted, and re-used by a different risk team without contacting the original author.

channels: GitHub issues on the public repo
Internal Q&A in the procurement Slack channel
feedback.next_move_threshold: If after 8 weeks we see <10% review-time reduction on pilot tasks OR 1+ critical safety finding, stop and re-scope.
